case_title: MARLOWE, DAVID VS ALEXANDER, STEVEN JACK C/O THE PIT SHOP et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO SEP-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF AUG-25-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF MAY-18-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARLOWE, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, STEVEN JACK C/O THE PIT SHOP TREICK, PHILIP W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF JUN-21-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CERT. RECEIPT TO PHILIP TRIECK RETURNED SIGNED.
LETTER FROM PAC. BELL STATING INABILITY TO RELEASE SUBPOENAED RECORDS.
INVALID POS ON SUBPOENAS TO PAUL STATHOCOPOLOUS, & SOPHIE MAKRAS, NOT ORIGINALS FILED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARLOWE, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TREICK, PHILIP W. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00, IF DEFT PHILIP TREICK PAYS $4000 IN FULL, CASE SHALL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, STEVEN JACK C/O THE PIT SHOP TREICK, PHILIP W.
